message:
test(labruntime): port 27 wezterm tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port 27 of 30 #[tokio::test] async tests from wezterm.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture. Covers MockWezterm operations, FailingMockWezterm,
WeztermHandleSource delegation, and UnifiedClient forwarding.
3 tests omitted: 2 use private retry_with method, 1 needs start_paused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
